## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages, console output, or screenshots.

## Environment

- OS:
- Browser (if frontend issue):
- Node version (`node -v`):
- pnpm version (`pnpm -v`):

## Additional Context

Any other context or information that may be relevant.
